action.reasoning: Observation: the first run failed before producing a checkpoint. Analysis: the root cause is offline loading of the Hugging Face DINOv2 image processor/model path; although the model may be cached, the processor config was not resolvable this way in this environment. Because no checkpoint was saved, the local predict smoke test then failed. Decision: switch immediately to a fully offline-safe torchvision/timm pipeline using CLIP ViT-B/16 from timm, implement explicit image transforms instead of AutoImageProcessor, retrain for a few epochs, locally test predict.py, and submit eval to establish a baseline/runtime.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --batch_size 32 --num_workers 4 --checkpoint_path checkpoints/baseline.pt && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_smoke --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline.pt --output /tmp/test_smoke_out.json
